pkgmetadata.longdescription: PyJKS enables Python projects to load and manipulate Java KeyStore(JKS) data without a JVM dependency. PyJKS supports JKS, JCEKS, BKSand UBER (BouncyCastle) keystores. Simply pip install pyjksOr easy_install pyjksThen import jks keystore jks.KeyStore.load(keystore.jks, passphrase) print(keystore.private_keys) print(keystore.certs) print(keystore.secret_keys)And thats barely scratching the surface. Check out the usage examples onGitHub httpsgithub.comkurtbrosepyjksusage-examples_ formore
